SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,207.81 FILED BY SF EXECUTIVE LIMO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, PAUL ANTHONY (OWNER AND DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SF EXECUTIVE LIMO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND WITH COURT CERTIFIED THAI LANGAUGE INTERPRETER SUPATRA CHOWCHUVECH. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2016 BY JPT JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT RETAIN BY THE COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF EXECUTIVE LIMO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, PAUL ANTHONY (OWNER AND DRIVER) $1,207.81 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,302.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
